summary: Focana 1.7.2 makes wake, pause, and next-task flows calmer and more reliable.
fixes: Focana now waits longer before opening the resume prompt after your Mac wakes.
The What's next? screen now fits properly, including the Next button.
Resume prompts no longer pulse right away when they appear.
Timer-end prompts no longer pulse unnecessarily as the timer finishes.
Pausing a session now shows clearer paused-session language.
Done for now is now Save and continue later, making it clearer that your task will be waiting when you come back.
Saving a paused session for later now keeps it available to resume reliably.
